title: galium angustifolium subsp. borregoense
intro: Galium angustifolium subsp. borregoense, also known as Borrego bedstraw, is a perennial plant species within the Galium genus. It is a member of the Rubiaceae family, and its medicinal properties lie in its ability to inhibit inflammation and reduce blood pressure. The plant's health benefits include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Galium angustifolium subsp. borregoense often involve infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for various health applications.
